message:
refactor(link): remove redundant sort_in_place on link exit batch

LinkBatch is consumed in iteration order and each entry is processed
independently by the supervisor — the processing order does not affect
correctness. The sort was an unnecessary O(n log n) operation on every
task exit that propagated links to peers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
